steps.title: Apply the earlier finding
steps.content: Singh and colleagues found that similarities in behavior between dog breeds correspond to genetic similarities, especially for chasing. If French bulldogs and bullmastiffs show similar chasing behavior, that similarity could have a genetic basis.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported comparisons
steps.content: Choice B compares individual dogs from the two breeds, which the text does not do. Choice C compares the breeds with most other breeds, which is also unstated. Choice D predicts future genetic change without evidence. The answer is A.
